_comment: Maps execution-spec-tests exception keys to Besu error-message patterns produced by validateAndProcessBlock (not the engine API). Organized by validation stage. Source: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs

substring._comment_header: Header validation — DetachedBlockHeaderValidationRule failures (gas limit, timestamp, basefee, extra data, blob gas, etc.)
substring._comment_body: Block body validation — MainnetBlockBodyValidator failures (receipts root, tx root, log bloom, withdrawals root, etc.)
substring.BlockException.INVALID_LOG_BLOOM: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_RECEIPTS_ROOT: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_TRANSACTIONS_ROOT: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_WITHDRAWALS_ROOT: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.RLP_WITHDRAWALS_NOT_READ: failed to validate output of imported block
substring._comment_state: World state — state root mismatch after block execution
substring.BlockException.INVALID_STATE_ROOT: World State Root does not match expected value
substring._comment_bal: Block Access List (BAL) — EIP-7928 block access list validation (keep even if unmatched, BAL is evolving)
substring.BlockException.BLOCK_ACCESS_LIST_GAS_LIM: Block access list validation failed for block
substring.BlockException.INCORRECT_BLOCK_FORMAT: Block access list validation failed for block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_BAL_EXTRA_ACCOUNT: Block access list validation failed for block
substring._comment_tx_gas: Transaction gas/fee errors — rejected by MainnetTransactionValidator
substring.TransactionException.GASLIMIT_PRICE_PROD: invalid Upfront gas cost cannot exceed 2^256 Wei
substring.TransactionException.INSUFFICIENT_MAX_FE: transaction invalid tx max fee per blob gas less than block blob gas fee
transaction invalid gasPrice is less than the current BaseFee
substring.TransactionException.NONCE_IS_MAX: invalid Nonce must be less than
substring.TransactionException.PRIORITY_GREATER_TH: transaction invalid max priority fee per gas cannot be greater than max fee per gas
substring._comment_tx_type: Transaction type errors — wrong tx type for the fork
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_CONTRACT_: transaction invalid transaction blob transactions must have a to address
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_EMPTY_AUTHOR: transaction invalid transaction code delegation transactions must have a non-empty code delegation list
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_TX_CONTRACT_: transaction invalid transaction code delegation transactions must have a to address
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_TX_PRE_FORK: transaction invalid Transaction type DELEGATE_CODE is invalid

regex._comment_header_regex: Header validation — when multiple error messages are possible depending on validation mode or fork
regex.BlockException.EXTRA_DATA_INVALID_DAO: Header validation failed|World State Root does not match
regex.BlockException.INCORRECT_BLOB_GAS_USED: block did not consume expected blob gas|Header validation failed \(LIGHT\)
regex._comment_body_regex: Block body / output validation — multiple possible error paths
regex.BlockException.INVALID_GAS_USED: failed to validate output of imported block|World State Root does not match
regex.BlockException.RLP_STRUCTURES_ENCODING: failed to validate output of imported block|Header validation failed
regex.BlockException.RLP_BLOCK_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Block size of \d+ bytes exceeds limit of \d+ bytes
regex._comment_parent: Block chain structure — missing or invalid parent
regex.BlockException.UNKNOWN_PARENT: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
regex.BlockException.UNKNOWN_PARENT_ZERO: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
regex._comment_system: System contract errors — EIP-7002/7251 system call failures
regex.BlockException.SYSTEM_CONTRACT_CALL_FAIL: System call halted|System call did not execute to completion
regex.BlockException.SYSTEM_CONTRACT_EMPTY: (Invalid system call, no code at address)|(Invalid system call address:)
regex._comment_deposit_request: Deposit / request validation — EIP-6110 deposit events and EIP-7685 requests
regex.BlockException.INVALID_DEPOSIT_EVENT_LAY: Invalid (amount|index|pubKey|signature|withdrawalCred) (offset|size): expected (\d+), but got (-?\d+)|Invalid deposit log length\. Must be \d+ bytes, but is \d+ bytes
regex.BlockException.INVALID_REQUESTS: Invalid execution requests|Requests hash mismatch, calculated: 0x[0-9a-f]+ header: 0x[0-9a-f]+
regex._comment_bal_regex: Block Access List (BAL) — EIP-7928 (keep even if unmatched)
regex.BlockException.INVALID_BLOCK_ACCESS_LIST: Block access list validation failed for block 0x[0-9a-f]+|Block access list hash mismatch, calculated: 0x[0-9a-f]+ header: 0x[0-9a-f]+
regex._comment_tx_funds: Transaction funds/gas errors — multiple error formats depending on the cause
regex.TransactionException.GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDS_M: transaction invalid Transaction gas limit must be at most \d+
regex.TransactionException.INITCODE_SIZE_EXCEE: transaction invalid Initcode size of \d+ exceeds maximum size of \d+
regex.TransactionException.INSUFFICIENT_ACCOUN: transaction invalid transaction up-front cost 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds transaction sender account balance 0x[0-9a-f]+|Header validation failed \(LIGHT\)
regex.TransactionException.INTRINSIC_GAS_BELOW: transaction invalid intrinsic gas cost \d+ exceeds gas limit \d+
regex.TransactionException.INTRINSIC_GAS_TOO_L: transaction invalid intrinsic gas cost \d+( \(regular \d+ \+ state \d+\))? exceeds gas limit \d+
regex.TransactionException.NONCE_MISMATCH_TOO_: transaction invalid transaction nonce \d+ does not match sender account nonce \d+
transaction invalid transaction nonce \d+ below sender account nonce \d+
regex.TransactionException.SENDER_NOT_EOA: transaction invalid Sender 0x[0-9a-f]+ has deployed code and so is not authorized to send transactions
regex._comment_tx_blob: Blob transaction (EIP-4844) errors — type 3 tx specific validations
regex.TR_TypeNotSupportedBlob: Transaction type BLOB is invalid, accepted transaction types are|replay protected signatures is not supported
regex.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_BLOB_COUN: Blob transaction has too many blobs: \d+|Invalid Blob Count: \d+|Header validation failed \(
regex.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_MAX_BLOB_: Blob transaction 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds block blob gas limit: \d+ > \d+|total blob gas \d+ exceeds max blob gas per block \d+|Header validation failed \(
